personas.name: The Multi-Unit Restaurant Operator
personas.ageRange: Director of Operations / VP Ops / Multi-Unit Franchisee — 3–50 locations
personas.trigger: Equipment fails mid-service · revenue down per minute
personas.fullProfileNotes: {"modalTitle":"The Multi-Unit Restaurant Operator","modalRole":"Director of Operations / VP Operations / Multi-Unit Franchisee — 3–50 locations across metro","demographics":{"age":"35–55","revenue":"$10M–$200M annual across units","role":"Director of Ops, VP Ops, or Multi-Unit Franchise Owner","industry":"QSR, fast-casual, full-service restaurant — franchise groups and corporate-owned chains"},"psychographics":{"values":"Speed to dispatch, OEM authorization on the brands they run, consolidated billing across every unit, response-time guarantees in writing.","fears":"A fryer down at dinner service costs four-figure revenue per hour. The bigger fear is the patchwork — different repair vendors per unit, no single accountability, parts delays the operator only finds out about after the lost service window.","motivations":"One reliable vendor across every unit; predictable monthly maintenance cost; a real human to call after hours; technician arrives knowing the equipment.","buying behavior":"Emergency dispatch is fast-and-loose — calls the first credible local result. Master service agreements are evaluated more carefully — operator wants to see OEM authorization, response-time SLAs, and references from comparable multi-unit operators."},"onlineBehavior":[{"channel":"search","text":"Google Search: Searches \"commercial appliance repair houston,\" \"restaurant equipment repair near me,\" \"fryer repair fast service\" — mobile, often from the location experiencing the failure."},{"channel":"review","text":"Reviews / GBP: Scans Google rating and review count in under 10 seconds during a service emergency. For contract evaluation, reads reviews specifically mentioning response time and multi-unit experience."},{"channel":"social","text":"LinkedIn: For contract evaluation, asks peer Multi-Unit Operators in industry groups. Trusts peer recommendations over advertising — a referral from another franchise group is the highest-value lead source."},{"channel":"ai","text":"AI platforms: Increasingly asks ChatGPT or Gemini \"best commercial kitchen repair company in Houston for restaurant chains.\" Answers cite vendor websites, reviews, and directory listings — Armstrong needs to be cite-worthy in those sources."}],"journeyStages":[{"step":1,"name":"Failure","description":"Walk-in fails at lunch rush · fryer down at dinner · ice machine fails mid-banquet."},{"step":2,"name":"Dispatch","description":"Mobile search from the location; first credible local vendor with visible 24/7 capability gets the call."},{"step":3,"name":"Evaluate","description":"Technician shows up; quality of fix and communication evaluated unit-by-unit over 60–90 days."},{"step":4,"name":"Consolidate","description":"If reliable across multiple emergency calls, operator initiates master service agreement conversation covering every unit in the metro."},{"step":5,"name":"Renew","description":"Annual contract renewal with PM schedule + emergency dispatch + consolidated invoice. Becomes peer reference for other franchise groups."}],"keySearchTerms":["commercial appliance repair houston","restaurant equipment repair near me","commercial fryer repair fast service","commercial kitchen equipment repair austin","multi-location restaurant equipment service","24/7 commercial appliance repair"]}

personas.ageRange: Director of Child Nutrition / Food Service Director — Texas ISDs
personas.trigger: Summer PM window · mid-semester equipment failure

decisionDrivers.title: Response time & dispatch capability
decisionDrivers.description: Hours-to-on-site for emergency calls, 24/7 availability, after-hours dispatch. Equipment down equals revenue down. The vendor who can prove a one-to-four-hour response window in writing wins the master service agreement.

decisionDrivers.title: OEM & manufacturer authorizations
decisionDrivers.description: Factory authorization on the commercial foodservice brands these operators actually run — Manitowoc, Hobart, Vulcan, Frymaster, Traulsen among the most common. Authorization signals certified technicians, OEM parts availability, and warranty compliance — table stakes for procurement.

decisionDrivers.title: Technician certifications & compliance
decisionDrivers.description: CFESA-certified technicians, EPA refrigeration certifications, district-approved status for K-12, vendor health-screening for healthcare. Background-check and badging readiness for secured corporate campuses and Texas Medical Center facilities.

decisionDrivers.title: Multi-location coverage & consolidated billing
decisionDrivers.description: For multi-unit restaurants, hotel groups, ISDs with multiple campuses, health systems, and corporate portfolios: one vendor covering every site under one master service agreement, with one consolidated invoice. Eliminates the patchwork of one-off repair vendors.

decisionDrivers.title: Scheduled PM aligned to operating calendar
decisionDrivers.description: K-12 PM during summer break, university PM during winter and spring break, hotel PM around convention calendars, healthcare PM around CMS / Joint Commission audit windows. Vendors who plan around the operator's calendar instead of their own win the renewal.

decisionDrivers.title: Insurance, bonding & references
decisionDrivers.description: Certificate of Insurance levels acceptable to corporate procurement, bonding for institutional and school district work, and peer references from comparable operators. K-12 directors call peer ISDs before signing — references from Pasadena ISD or Crosby ISD are leverage no national network can match locally.

channelMap.usageNotes: Primary discovery — emergency "commercial appliance repair [city]" and contract-evaluation searches
Local trust signal — reviews, hours, response capability, service area definition for both Houston and Austin
B2B decision-maker targeting — F&B Directors, Facilities Managers, Multi-Unit Operators, Nutrition Directors. ~14,000 reachable across both metros.
Rising rapidly — buyers asking ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity for "best commercial kitchen repair Houston/Austin" recommendations
CFESA member directory, Texas Restaurant Association, National Restaurant Association, hotel brand approved-vendor lists
Corporate / institutional buyers on managed Windows + Edge environments — meaningful B2B reach at lower CPC than Google
Retargeting website visitors, brand awareness among independent operators and chef networks; not the primary discovery channel
